title: Intent
description: An Amazon Lex intent representing an action a user can perform.

intentId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the intent.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with this intent.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with this intent.

localeId.description: The language and locale of the intent.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time the intent was created.
